### Post by drndrw on 2008-03-17
Hey guys. For a while now, I've had trouble setting up Dynamic DNS. And now that I have ISPConfig installed, I would like it more than ever. But it isn't working. I have the ports opened on my router, and I beleive they are opened on my firewall, and on my server. This is what my ddclient configuration file looks like:

```
# Configuration file for ddclient generated by debconf
#
# /etc/ddclient.conf

pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid
protocol=dyndns2
use=web, web=checkip.dyndns.com/, web-skip='IP Address'
server=members.dyndns.org
login=drndrw
password=''
drndrw.gotdns.com

```

What am I doing wrong? My hostname is drndrw.gotdns.com. Thanks!

# This file describes the network interfaces available on your system

iface eth0 inet dhcp
